Emscripten integration for Pebble firmware with graphics, resources, tests, and JavaScript bindings.

## Folders
- **[html](html/README.md)**: CSS styles for Bootstrap, typography, layout, JavaScript for form handling, and a Rocky simulator HTML file.
- **[integration_tests](integration_tests/README.md)**: Ignore rules for `node_modules` and empty `configure` and `build` functions for integration tests.
- **[tests](tests/README.md)**: Tests for custom resources in Emscripten and a build script for test configuration and results.
- **[timeshift-js](timeshift-js/README.md)**: Mock Date object implementation for time and timezone manipulation, QUnit testing setup, and package configuration.

## Files
- **[emscripten_app.c](emscripten_app.c.md)**: Initializes and manages the event loop for an Emscripten-based Pebble app, including graphics and resources.
- **[emscripten_app.h](emscripten_app.h.md)**: Declares functions for initializing and running the Emscripten app event loop.
- **[emscripten_clock.c](emscripten_clock.c.md)**: Manages 24-hour clock style settings with functions to get and set the style.
- **[emscripten_graphics.c](emscripten_graphics.c.md)**: Graphics handling and window management for Emscripten in the Pebble firmware.
- **[emscripten_graphics.h](emscripten_graphics.h.md)**: Graphics initialization and context management functions for Emscripten in Pebble firmware.
- **[emscripten_jerry_api.c](emscripten_jerry_api.c.md)**: Emscripten integration for JerryScript API, including functions for value creation, manipulation, and type checking.
- **[emscripten_jerry_port.c](emscripten_jerry_port.c.md)**: Initializes and deinitializes the Rocky runtime context.
- **[emscripten_resources.c](emscripten_resources.c.md)**: Manages custom and system resources for Emscripten, including reading, size retrieval, and registration.
- **[emscripten_resources.h](emscripten_resources.h.md)**: Functions and callbacks for managing and accessing resources in an Emscripten environment.
- **[emscripten_tick_timer_service.c](emscripten_tick_timer_service.c.md)**: Implements a tick timer service for scheduling time updates and handling time changes in Emscripten.
- **[emscripten_tick_timer_service.h](emscripten_tick_timer_service.h.md)**: Initializes the Emscripten tick timer service.
- **[exported_functions.json](exported_functions.json.md)**: A list of exported functions for graphics, resources, fonts, and sequences in the Pebble firmware.
- **[html-binding.js](html/README.md-binding.js)**: Binds the Rocky Simulator to an HTML canvas element for rendering using Emscripten.
- **[jerry_api.js](jerry_api.js.md)**: JavaScript interface for managing Jerryscript values, including reference counting and error handling.
- **[shims.c](shims.c.md)**: Implements memory management, logging, resource handling, and font operations for Emscripten targets.
- **[transform_js.py](transform_js.py.md)**: Transforms JavaScript files by removing specific memory access functions and applying a patch for Emscripten compatibility.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build configuration and tasks for Emscripten in the Pebble firmware project, including resource packaging and platform-specific settings.
